OVERVIEW
The 10X Income System is a program that includes training, support and
accountability to help people make more money. It is unique in that it helps students
create more income streams as well as make more money doing what they are
already doing.
The sales of this program is done using an automated webinar. The webinar is
scheduled to run several times a day and has both email and text follow up to ensure a
registrant attends their scheduled session. The majority of these automated messages
are sent by the webinar system (we use Everwebinar), but the information is also
captured in our CRM (we use Hubspot).
After the scheduled webinar for any particular user they are sent an immediate
follow-up sequence depending on which of these groups they fall into…
After initial follow messages are sent to each of those groups, a close down sequence
is sent to all non-buyers. This close down sequence uses real urgency and removes
bonuses at the end of the sequence if the user does not buy the program.
OFFER: 10X INCOME SYSTEM
WEBINAR FUNNEL SWIPE FILE
No show for webinar (invited to schedule again)
Attendees who left early (sent replay video)
Attendees who stayed until end (sent sales page)

You will notice that we’ve created a number of different versions for several of the
registration page and the sales page. The alternate versions have the same
functionality as the others, but different design and messaging. This is done to simply
provide more variety and to allow for more multiple sales angles.
It is worth noting that this setup is significantly more advanced than described in the
10X Sales Funnel Manual (10xdownload.com/ ) and the 10X Webinar Funnel Flowchart
(10xdownload.com/ ). While any number of structures can be used, we wanted to show
you some configurations that can be used to maximize conversions.

-- 2 of 15 --

GENERAL NOTE
We made all of our landing pages have the same basic functionality. After the user
clicks a button they choose a time to attend, and then in the next step they provide
their contact information. The user is then sent to the webinar confirmation page.
REGISTRATION PAGE (TICKET DESIGN)
10xwebclass.com/ticket
1A
[SFSF Webinar 2 on laptop]
TECHNOLOGY NOTE
As mentioned, we’ve used a program called Everwebinar. It should be noted that
we’ve highly customized it. The good news is that they provide pre-built registration
pages out of the box to make it easy.
ADVANCED NOTE
One thing worth noting is that we’ve built these pages so that they display time in
the user’s own timezone. This is an optional feature and reduces confusion for
registrants.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 15 --

GENERAL NOTE
This functions similarly to 1A, but with a different design. This simple design has the
highest registration rate on paid traffic. Sometimes basic works best!
REGISTRATION PAGE (BASIC DESIGN)
10xwebclass.com/training
1B
ADVANCE NOTE
A major breakthrough on this page was when we changed the design to put the time
options directly on the page. Previously the schedule was on the popup after the
button was clicked. It was a split test that had a big payoff.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 15 --

GENERAL NOTE
This also functions exactly like 1A, but with a different design. We split test many
variations of the page and this basic layout and color scheme won.
REGISTRATION PAGE (DOWNLOAD DESIGN)
10xwebclass.com/free
1C
ADVANCE NOTE
One thing you’ll notice on this page is that everything you click will open the sign up
box. People will often click images, so if you can make them have an action it will help
conversion rates.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.

-- 5 of 15 --

GENERAL NOTE
This page provides the registrant with details about the webinar and also allows them
to download a workbook. This is a good method for getting attendees to participate
during the free training session.
ADVANCE NOTE
There are a few things that have really helped our attendance rate, which is usually
between 50% to 60%. One is to add an “add to calendar” widget (we use a program
called AddEvent). Another is to use a messenger bot sign up button (we use a
program called ManyChat).

-- 6 of 15 --

GENERAL NOTE
The webinar time is unique to the user and provided by the automated webinar
provider. After the user registers their link is automatically emailed to them. While the
webinar appears as if it is live, we do not recommend saying that it is.
WEBINAR BROADCAST ROOM
Must attend to view
3
TECHNOLOGY NOTE
Toward the end of the webinar you will see “call to action” buttons appear on the right
side (visible in image above). This is a feature of the webinar system and is how the
user goes from the webinar room to the main sales page.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 15 --

GENERAL NOTE
This main sales page generates the majority of the sales for this funnel since users are
coming directly from the webinar ready to buy. While this is a long page that includes
sales copy and information about the product, we’ve found through testing that it is
best to put the order form and offer “stack” at the top. This way people who want to
buy right away can do so, those that want to scroll down to learn more can as well. All
buttons on the page send the user back up to the top to purchase.
SALES PAGE (MAIN PAGE)
10xincomesystem.com/all-bonuses
4A
TECHNOLOGY NOTE
This uses Clickfunnels 2-step checkout order form feature. If the user completes step 1
but does not complete payment it triggers a shopping cart abandonment sequence.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 15 --

REGISTRATION PAGE (RE-REGISTER DESIGN)
10xwebclass.com/reregister/Bob/bob@gmail.com
1D
GENERAL NOTE
After a webinar ends, the webinar system can trigger automated emails for anyone
who does not attend at their scheduled time. It is highly recommended that you
always send non-attendees to re-register for the webinar (instead of watching a replay
video). People are more likely to attend and buy if they schedule a time.
ADVANCE NOTE
Since we already have the user’s email address, we figured out how to create a
one-click registration page. As you can see above, the link is designed to include the
user’s name and email address. This information is automatically taken from the email
marketer using what is called
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.

-- 9 of 15 --

SALES PAGE (REPLAY DESIGN)
10xincomesystem.com/replay
4B
GENERAL NOTE
This page is sent to anyone who attended the webinar, but left before the end. Again,
this is something that can be triggered by the automated webinar system. The replay
page allows users to “pick up where they left off” on a video version of the webinar.
This page has the same information to purchase the program below the replay video
as is on the main sales page.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 15 --

SALES PAGE (DOWNLOAD DESIGN)
10xincomesystem.com/workbook-notes
4C
GENERAL NOTE
This page is sent to anyone who attended the webinar and stayed on until the end.
By sending a free download with the workbook notes, we are basically giving the user
another reason to visit a sales page and potentially buy. The product and sales info
below the video are identical to the main sales page.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 15 --

SALES PAGE (CONTENT DESIGN)
10xincomesystem.com/what-it-takes
4D
GENERAL NOTE
After the initial follow up emails, which are customized to the user based on their
webinar attendance, a general close down sequence begins. The emails in this
sequence have countdown timers throughout to create urgency (we use a system
called Deadline Funnel). The first emails in the sequence come from a value
perspective, including a link to this page which gives a video of Grant teaching an
important lesson. The product and sales info below the video are identical to the
main sales page.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 15 --

SALES PAGE (BONUS ADDED DESIGN)
10xincomesystem.com/bonus-added
4E
GENERAL NOTE
In order to create more excitement about the offer, we send an email that discusses
an added bonus. The user doesn’t know what the bonus is until they land on the
page, causing curiosity and a high click-through rate. Besides the added bonus, the
product and sales info below the video are identical to the main sales page.
© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
See more below
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 15 --

SALES PAGE (LAST CALL DESIGN)
10xincomesystem.com/last-call
4E
GENERAL NOTE
For the last few days of the countdown we send to this “last call” page. At the top of
the page is a video of Grant giving a very direct sales pitch. Besides the main sales
page this page has the most sales conversions.
